summary: Phase 6 FINAL testing complete - Analytics Dashboard with Recharts, skeleton loaders, back buttons, and real stats on dashboard. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with all features working as expected.
passed_tests: Backend: Analytics endpoint requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: Analytics returns correct structure (totalCalls, activeKeys, avgLatency, errorRate, callsByDay, callsByEndpoint, recentRequests)
Backend: totalCalls is non-negative integer
Backend: activeKeys is non-negative integer
Backend: avgLatency is non-negative number
Backend: errorRate is percentage between 0-100
Backend: callsByDay has 7 days with date and count fields
Backend: callsByEndpoint has endpoint and count fields
Backend: recentRequests has timestamp, endpoint, method, keyName, statusCode, latencyMs fields
Backend: Invalid project ID returns 404
Backend: Projects list returns totalCalls, avgLatency, exposedEndpointCount for live projects
Backend: Project stats are numeric values
Backend: Analytics handles empty data gracefully (returns zeros, not errors)
Frontend: Analytics page loads at /analytics/{projectId}
Frontend: 4 stats cards displayed (Total Calls, Active Keys, Avg Latency, Error Rate)
Frontend: API Calls Over Time area chart with Recharts renders correctly
Frontend: Top Endpoints horizontal bar chart renders correctly
Frontend: Recent Requests table shows Time, Endpoint, Method, API Key, Status, Latency columns
Frontend: Empty state shows 'No API traffic yet' message with zeros and empty charts
Frontend: Dashboard project cards show real stats (calls, latency) for live projects
Frontend: Dashboard skeleton loader implemented (animate-pulse)
Frontend: Keys page has 'Back to project' link that navigates correctly
Frontend: Endpoints page has 'Back to Dashboard' link
Frontend: Analytics page has 'Back to project' link
Frontend: Sidebar highlights Analytics when on /analytics/{projectId}
Frontend: Keys table has responsive overflow (overflow-x-auto)
Frontend: Dark theme consistent across all pages
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Empty_Analytics project during backend tests to verify empty state handling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 features (Analytics Dashboard, skeleton loaders, back buttons, real stats) are fully functional. The analytics endpoint uses MongoDB aggregation pipelines on usage_logs collection. Test projects: deploy-test (3 usage_logs, 5 active keys, 11 endpoints) and fast-deploy-test (3 usage_logs, 2 active keys, 2 endpoints). Recharts library (v3.8.1) is installed and working for AreaChart and BarChart.

analytics_data_structure.totalCalls: integer - total API calls for project
analytics_data_structure.activeKeys: integer - count of active API keys
analytics_data_structure.callsByDay: array of {date, count} for last 7 days
analytics_data_structure.recentRequests: array of last 20 requests with timestamp, endpoint, method, keyName, statusCode, latencyMs
